name: Herbed Spaghetti Squash with Mozzarella
recipeIngredient: 5 large cloves garlic, peeled and halved
4 oz smoked or plain mozzarella, diced into 1/4 inch pieces
1 cup basil leaves, finely packed and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Halve the Spaghetti squash lengthwise. Scoop out and discard the seeds. Place cut side up in a baking pan; add butter and garlic to hollow centers. Sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon pepper. Cover tightly with foil; bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes or until very tender. (To microwave: Pierce the whole squash several times with a fork. Place it in a glass baking dish. Cook on HIGH for 18 minutes, turning the squash every 4 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes. Place butter in a small glass bowl; melt on HIGH for 30 seconds. Add garlic and cook on HIGH for 1 minute.)
2. Remove squash from oven; discard foil. With a fork, transfer garlic to a small bowl and mash. Using a fork, scrape the Spaghetti squash strands into a large bowl. Add mashed garlic, cheese, and basil; toss. Season to taste with additional salt and pepper. If desired, sprinkle with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
